title: Conditional vLLM parser bypass — only disable tool_choice and enable special token passthrough when tools are present for Kimi/Qwen

in: Add tool-presence guard in rewriteVllmPayload before applying DISABLE_TOOL_CHOICE_MODELS overrides
Only set tool_choice=none and skip_special_tokens=false when payload.tools is non-empty

requirements: When payload has no tools: tool_choice NOT modified, skip_special_tokens NOT set
When payload has tools: existing behavior preserved
